reason: Audited Codex lobby-seed run. Verified that cryptography Blowfish self-tests passed and packets 8745/8844/8974 were tested with the lobby seed 73 5A 12 08. next_action: Codex must sequentially decrypt and update the key state through the 31 intermediate C2S packets starting from SM_KEY 7522 to reach the correct key state at packet 8745.
